description: Fired when a new user successfully creates an account
Fired when an existing user signs in (email/password or OAuth)
Fired when the user visits the upgrade/pricing page — top of the conversion funnel
Fired when the user clicks to subscribe to a plan and the checkout URL is opened
Fired when the user lands on the post-checkout success page after a successful payment
Fired when a user sends a message to the AI legal assistant
Fired when a new AI conversation is automatically created on the first message
Fired when one or more documents are successfully uploaded to the Vault
Fired when a user downloads a document from the Vault
Fired when the status of a Vault document is updated
Fired when Lex Pilot generates one or more legal documents from templates
Fired when a user runs a monetary correction calculation in the legal calculator
